bead.title: [artifact-run-arch] repo-wide verb migration + agent_*.go cleanup
bead.description: Per plan: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-04-29-artifact-and-run-architecture.md. ATOMIC with #3. (a) Delete DDx reimplementations of upstream subcommands: agent_list/capabilities/doctor/check/models/providers/route_status/catalog/reindex/benchmark/replay. (b) Migrate DDx-only subcommands: agent_executions->tries_*, agent_log->runs_log, agent_metrics->runs_metrics, agent_usage folded into runs_metrics, agent_workers->work_workers. (c) Register DDx overrides on mounted subtree (deprecations + condense). (d) Update scripts/hooks/library skills/personas/docs/README/demos to new verbs. Critical files: scripts/eval-skill.sh, scripts/capture-omlx-fixture.sh, scripts/test-doc-snippets.sh, scripts/demos/06-full-journey.sh, library/.agents/skills/ddx-refine-plan/SKILL.md, library/personas/README.md, cli/cmd/init.go:757, cli/cmd/bead_review.go:30-33.
